citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:34 pm on
4/28/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by speaking to the Licensee who stated no one was available
for an inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA
and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:34 pm on 
4/28/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by speaking to the Licensee who stated no one was available 
for an inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA 
and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
